---
title: "SIB_kurzus_2026"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

---
title: "Baby Names Project"
format: html
---

# Introduction

In this project, we aim to visualize the trends of the most frequently used baby names from 1880 to 2017 in the United States.

We do this by:

-   Understanding the different columns of the data set
-   Finding the top 10 most frequently used baby names in the data for:
    -   girls
    -   boys
-   Plotting the yearly trend of the top 10 baby names

![](image.png){width="54"}

```         
```
